_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the serverless tenant-Robot-Units-exhausted scenario (serverless-cannot-start-licensing playbook, branch 3). The agent chains: folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted (two serverless processes, two users, same tenant-RU message) -> jobs get (RuntimeType Serverless, Info: tenant RU exceeded) -> jobs logs -> licenses info (tenant pool 0 of 25, per-user quota fine). Keys are stable.

rules._doc: Proxy any docsai query to the real uip CLI; cache in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
